item.description:
DynaNotch v1.0.0

Initial release. Fork of Boring.Notch with significant improvements.

  • Fixed 18 critical crashes
  • Resolved memory leaks (Mach port, CFMachPort, CFRunLoopSource)
  • Thread safety with @MainActor
  • Added timeout and HTTP status validation to sports APIs
  • Accessibility labels for 20+ interactive controls
  • Silenced 79 debug print() calls in Release builds
